package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for http_client_allocated_per_call_without_reuse: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: http.Client literals allocated on regular call paths instead of being reused as shared client state.
type CaseHttpClientAllocatedPerCallWithoutReuseDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHttpClientAllocatedPerCallWithoutReuseModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHttpClientAllocatedPerCallWithoutReuseRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHttpClientAllocatedPerCallWithoutReuseModel
}

type CaseHttpClientAllocatedPerCallWithoutReuseService struct {
    repo *CaseHttpClientAllocatedPerCallWithoutReuseRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHttpClientAllocatedPerCallWithoutReuseAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeHttpClientAllocatedPerCallWithoutReuse(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHttpClientAllocatedPerCallWithoutReuseDTO) error {
    focus := "http_client_allocated_per_call"
    _ = focus
    client := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
    resp, err := client.Get(input)
    if err != nil { return err }
    defer resp.Body.Close()
    io.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)
    http_client_allocated_per_call_negative := map[string]int{"http": 1, "client": 2, "allocated": 3, "per": 4, "call": 5, "reuse": 6}
    http_client_allocated_per_call_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    http_negative_0 := http_client_allocated_per_call_negative["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_negative_0
    client_negative_1 := http_client_allocated_per_call_negative["client"] + len(input)
    _ = client_negative_1
    allocated_negative_2 := http_client_allocated_per_call_negative["allocated"] + len(input)
    _ = allocated_negative_2
    for per_negative_3Index, item := range items { http_client_allocated_per_call_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_3Index }
    call_negative_4 := http_client_allocated_per_call_negative["call"] + len(input)
    _ = call_negative_4
    reuse_negative_5 := http_client_allocated_per_call_negative["reuse"] + len(input)
    _ = reuse_negative_5
    return nil
}
